title: Gateway nRF52840 build lacks zephyr,uart-pipe chosen node
description: After fixing the LICHEN Zephyr module bridge subdirectory path, west build -p always -b nrf52840dk/nrf52840 lichen/apps/gateway -d build_gateway_i81y20_path_check passes CMake configure and then fails compiling zephyr/drivers/serial/uart_pipe.c because DT_CHOSEN(zephyr_uart_pipe) has no device. Decide whether the gateway board overlay should define zephyr,uart-pipe or whether CONFIG_UART_PIPE should be disabled/conditioned for this board.
close_reason: Fixed: nrf52840dk gateway board config disables Zephyr wired SLIP because this board uses BLE NUS for the local client interface. Verified west build gets past the previous zephyr,uart-pipe/uart_pipe.c failure; next blocker is OSCORE dependency compile errors tracked as project-LICHEN-zq76.
